title: anthemis cairica
intro: Anthemis cairica, also known as dog fennel, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Anthemis cairica include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Anthemis cairica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
